name: directions_get
description: Calculate directions and routes between an origin and destination with optional waypoints, travel mode, and traffic awareness.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Starting point as address, place ID (place_id:xxx), or lat,lng coordinates.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Ending point as address, place ID, or coordinates.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Travel mode: driving (default), walking, bicycling, or transit.

parameters.name: waypoints
parameters.description: Intermediate stops separated by pipes. Prefix with 'optimize:true' to optimize order.

parameters.name: avoid
parameters.description: Features to avoid: tolls, highways, ferries, indoor. Pipe-separated.

parameters.name: departure_time
parameters.description: Departure time as Unix timestamp or 'now' for traffic-aware routing.

parameters.name: arrival_time
parameters.description: Desired arrival time as Unix timestamp (transit mode only).

parameters.name: traffic_model
parameters.description: Traffic model: best_guess (default), pessimistic, or optimistic.

parameters.name: transit_mode
parameters.description: Transit mode filter: bus, subway, train, tram, rail. Pipe-separated.

parameters.name: transit_routing_preference
parameters.description: Transit routing preference: less_walking or fewer_transfers.
